REPLACE THIS FILE with the verbatim transcript of vocab-biasing-clip.wav
(your own ~10 s recording — see ../audio/README.md for the workflow).

The test asserts that at least one term from
tests/fixtures/vocab/glossary.txt appears verbatim in the transcript
when the audio actually contains it. The default glossary terms are:

  - pywhispercpp
  - VisionCell
  - Acme Robotics
  - Tailwind
  - WebVTT
  - Ollama

Example reading (record yourself saying it, then drop the WAV next to
this file as vocab-biasing-clip.wav, then replace this preamble with the
exact same words):

"I use pywhispercpp to transcribe meetings into WebVTT,
piping them through Ollama for summarisation."
